final_prompt.prompt:
Create a screenshot of a Douyin (TikTok) live stream featuring a female streamer called 神仙姐姐 holding a sign.

Style/medium: mobile UI screenshot, Douyin live stream interface, photorealistic portrait
Composition: 9:16 vertical frame, selfie-style front camera angle, streamer centered in frame with live stream UI overlays (viewer count, comments, gift buttons)
Subject: elegant female streamer 神仙姐姐 with graceful appearance, holding a rectangular sign with both hands at chest level, warm engaging expression
Scene/backdrop: cozy indoor streaming room with soft bokeh background, ring light visible
Lighting/mood: soft ring light from front, warm and inviting atmosphere typical of live streaming
Color palette: warm skin tones, soft pinks and creams, Douyin brand accent colors (black/red UI elements)
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: must look like an authentic mobile screenshot with proper Douyin UI elements; text on sign must be clearly readable
Avoid: distorted fingers, unnatural hand positioning, blurry text, watermark from other platforms, desktop interface elements
